_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology
_publications._fundingAgency: NTAP; NCI; Department of Defense CDMRP
_publications._context: JH-2-055-b PDX (formerly JH-2-055; renamed because multiple samples were processed from a single patient) included in ex vivo 3D microtissue platform study; microtissue quality not determined (ND)

_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors
_publications._context: Four patient-derived MPNST cell lines (JH-2–002, JH-2–009, JH-2–031 and JH-2–055)

basicInfo.description: NF1-associated MPNST patient-derived xenograft developed at Johns Hopkins University; renamed from JH-2-055 when multiple samples from the same patient were processed; primary scalp/neck MPNST in a pediatric female patient
basicInfo.clinicalData: Sex: Female; MPNST age group: 10–17 years; MPNST location: scalp/neck; MPNST type: primary; MPNST size: <10 cm; clinical status: alive with metastatic disease
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Department of Oncology, Johns Hopkins University School of Medicine; Sidney Kimmel Comprehensive Cancer Center
